description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a dark green, pebbly skin covered in small yellow-green speckles and a few minor brown spots. The surface is slightly bumpy and matte, with a subtle sheen that highlights its natural texture. The shape is ovoid, tapering gently to a rounded point at one end and featuring a small, brownish stem remnant at the other. The skin appears thick and firm, typical of ripe avocados, and the coloration suggests it is ready to eat. No visible cuts or openings reveal the creamy, pale green interior. The avocado is presented isolated against a plain white background, emphasizing its natural form and details.
description: A whole, ripe Hass avocado with dark green, bumpy skin and a small brown stem, shown isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Side view showing the avocado's ovoid shape, bumpy green skin, and subtle yellow speckles.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the small brown stem and the rounded, slightly flattened top surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth taper toward the pointed end and the consistent skin texture.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the broad, rounded base and the overall symmetry of the avocado.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor brown spots and small dark patches
